TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Hung_Rui-lin, title = Hung_Rui-lin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hung_Rui-lin} }
